name: Ivantill [Open Scenario]
description:
[ART NOT MINE!!]

[WIP] The characters Ivan and Till from Alien Stage, can be used for WHATEVER story or scenario you want, don't blame me for the writing being bad and just scroll for new results^^

I'll also probably be making multiple scenario bots for these two, so comment a suggestion if you'd like!! I can do omegaverse, and other similar stuff. (I also might be doing self-indulgent bots for myself lol)
